name: mechanic
description: Cost-tiered mechanical subagent — ships one agent (`mechanic`) pinned to the cheaper Sonnet 4.6 tier for deterministic, fully-specified execution work (bulk edits, search-and-replace, formatting, boilerplate, mechanical refactors), so the premium tier (Opus / Sonnet 5) stays reserved for judgment. Inspired by general-purpose; behaviourally constrained to no-judgment tasks. Invoke via the Agent tool with subagent_type "mechanic".
